layers.title: Sampling configuration surface
layers.summary: The old integer rate-limit knob is replaced with three ratio-based sampling controls and a structured protobuf config. This establishes the configuration and wire surface consumed by the runtime sampler and propagated from workers to clients.

layers.title: Sampler runtime core
layers.summary: On top of the new config surface, the runtime implementation removes the first-N per-second limiter and adds a hash-threshold `LogSampler`. The hot path now gates LOG/PLOG creation, access recording, request trace decisions, and sampler snapshot publication without the old window counters.

layers.title: Client worker propagation
layers.summary: With the sampler core available, client and worker paths are updated to apply worker-published sample config on register and heartbeat responses. RPC metadata continues to carry request-level sample state, while client, worker, C, Java, and Python bindings move access-log call sites onto lazy recorder facades.

layers.title: Sampler validation coverage
layers.summary: The validation layer replaces old limiter tests with unit, integration, access-facade, config, performance, system, and RPC metadata sampling tests. These tests cover disabled fast paths, distribution, config rejection, access pre-drop behavior, request propagation, and log-message creation semantics.
layers.diff:
@@ tests/ut/common/log/BUILD.bazel
+    name = "log_sampler_test",
+    srcs = ["log_sampler_test.cpp"],
+@@ tests/ut/common/log/spdlog/BUILD.bazel
-    name = "log_rate_limiter_test",
-    srcs = ["log_rate_limiter_test.cpp"],
@@ tests/ut/common/rpc/zmq_trace_sampling_meta_test.cpp
-        LogRateLimiter::Instance().Reset();
+        LogSampler::Instance().ResetForTest();
@@ tests/ut/common/log/log_sampler_test.cpp
+TEST_F(LogSamplerTest, ConcurrentConfigUpdateAndHotPathRead)

layers.title: Operator documentation context
layers.summary: Finally, repository context and Chinese operator documentation are updated to describe the new sampling model and remove old environment guidance. The added design, spec, and plan files make the performance and propagation assumptions explicit for future logging work.
layers.diff:
@@ .repo_context/index.md
+| design unified class-based random log sampling | `modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md` | `src/datasystem/common/log/*`, `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/*`, `src/datasystem/common/metrics/hard_disk_exporter/*`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/*` |
@@ .repo_context/modules/infra/logging/README.md
+- `LogSampler` provides unified random hash-threshold sampling across request/access/diagnostic dimensions, with per-request granularity and low-overhead hot-path decisions.
@@ docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/log_guide.md
+request_sample_rate
+access_sample_rate
+diagnostic_sample_rate

bcFindings.evidence: `include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h` removes the public `EmbeddedConfig &LogRateLimit(int limit);` method and replaces it with `RequestSampleRate(double)`, `AccessSampleRate(double)`, and `DiagnosticSampleRate(double)`.

`src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h` is deleted, removing the public `class LogRateLimiter` and its `Instance`, `ShouldLog`, `SetRate`, `GetOrCreateRequestDecision`, `IsEnabled`, and `Reset` methods.

`src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h` removes public `Record(...)` overloads from `AccessRecorder`; callers must use the new `Object`, `Stream`, or `RequestOut` facade types and their `Record()` methods.
`src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h` removes the public `AccessRecorderStreamWrap` struct and replaces stream logging with the new `StreamAccessRecorder` facade.

`src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto` replaces `int32 log_rate_limit = 24;` with `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 24;`, removing the generated `log_rate_limit` field/accessors from the protobuf API.

`src/datasystem/common/log/logging.cpp` removes `DS_DEFINE_int32(log_rate_limit, ...)`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/flags.h` removes `log_rate_limit` from the dynamic whitelist, and deployment docs/configs switch to the three `*_sample_rate` flags.

summary: This PR replaces the old first-N request log rate limiter with a unified hash-based sampler spanning request, access, and diagnostic logs, including config propagation, lazy access logging, docs, deployment settings, and tests.
